regions.text: Which is shorter—a quarter of an hour or half an hour?
Which is shorter—the minute hand or the hour hand of a clock?
This is an inch. The distance from A to B is one inch.
Half an inch is a shorter distance than an inch.
A quarter of an inch Three-quarters of an inch
This is a foot. How long is it? It is ten inches long.
Three feet make a yard. This is a yard measure. There are thirty-six inches in a yard.
These are feet. They are not twelve inches long.
